rows.label: qev095205_MSG0001
rows.name:
Living together with those who do not
possess an Ovah is a cause for lingering
doubts, but I suppose it is necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095205_MSG0002
rows.name:
We have no means to survive, save by
allying ourselves to you or the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095205_MSG0003
rows.name:
We can only hope that this
was the correct choice.[ST:wait ]
